nasb.text: and he cried out with a loud voice, as when a lion roars; and when he had cried out, the seven peals of thunder uttered their voices.

esv.text: and called out with a loud voice, like a lion roaring. When he called out, the seven thunders sounded.

cnv.text: 大聲呼喊，好像獅子吼叫。他呼喊的時候，就有七雷發聲說話。

ccb.text: 他大喊的时候，声如狮吼，之后有七声雷鸣。

csbs.text: 大声呼喊，好像狮子吼叫。他一呼喊，那七个雷就发出自己的声音。
